# CWE-261 — Weak Encoding for Password (safe)
lang: go
file: CWE-261-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"golang.org/x/crypto/bcrypt"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type Account struct {
	ID       uint
	Username string
	Secret   string
}

// Safe: bcrypt one-way hash, not reversible encoding.
func RegisterUser(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	pw := c.PostForm("password")
	hash, err := bcrypt.GenerateFromPassword([]byte(pw), bcrypt.DefaultCost)
	if err != nil {
		c.JSON(500, gin.H{"error": "hash"})
		return
	}
	acct := Account{Username: c.PostForm("username"), Secret: string(hash)}
	db.Create(&acct)
	c.JSON(201, gin.H{"ok": true})
}
